name: Threads Search
description: Search trending posts on Threads by keywords and update popular-posts.txt.

keywordsPath.description: Path to search-keywords.txt. Defaults to data/search-keywords.txt.

popularPostsPath.description: Path to popular-posts.txt. Defaults to data/popular-posts.txt.

archivePath.description: Path to popular-posts-archive.txt. Defaults to data/popular-posts-archive.txt.

maxPopularPosts.description: Max posts to keep in popular-posts.txt. Default: 30.

minLikes.description: Minimum likes to qualify as trending. Default: 10.

searchDays.description: Only include posts from last N days. Default: 7.
